mapper.select: select coalesce((select count(1) from jst_enroll_record er where er.user_id = #{userId} and er.del_flag = '0'), 0) as enrollCount, coalesce((select count(1) from jst_score_record sr where sr.user_id = #{userId} and sr.publish_status = 'published' and sr.del_flag = '0'), 0) as scoreCount, coalesce((select count(1) from jst_cert_record cr where cr.user_id = #{userId} and cr.issue_status = 'issued' and cr.del_flag = '0'), 0) as certCount, coalesce((select count(1) from jst_course_learn_record clr where clr.user_id = #{userId} and clr.del_flag = '0'), 0) as courseCount, coalesce((select pa.frozen_points from jst_points_account pa where pa.owner_id = #{userId} and pa.owner_type in ('user', 'student') and pa.del_flag = '0' order by pa.account_id desc limit 1), 0) as frozenPoints, (select lc.level_name from jst_user u left join jst_points_account pa on pa.owner_id = u.user_id and pa.owner_type in ('user', 'student') and pa.del_flag = '0' left join jst_level_config lc on lc.level_id = coalesce(pa.current_level_id, u.current_level_id) and lc.del_flag = '0' where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0' order by pa.account_id desc limit 1) as levelName, coalesce((select count(1) from jst_user_coupon uc where uc.user_id = #{userId} and uc.status = 'unused' and uc.del_flag = '0'), 0) as couponCount, 0 as unreadMsgCount from dual

select c.channel_name as name, null as school, c.remark as remark from jst_student_channel_binding b inner join jst_channel c on c.channel_id = b.channel_id and c.del_flag = '0' where b.user_id = #{userId} and b.status = 'active' and b.del_flag = '0' order by b.binding_id desc limit 1
